name: ProblemsWithActivation
description: Customer has attempted to activate their new Virgin Media service or equipment — such as self-installing broadband via quickstart, setting up a TV box, or activating a streaming subscription — and the activation has failed, is stuck, or is producing errors. This is a post-attempt failure, not a request for activation guidance, a general service fault, or an error code query on established services.

sampleUtterances.utterance: My {activationProductType} activation has {activationProblemType}
I've set up my new {activationProductType} but it won't activate
My new {activationProductType} is {activationProblemType} during activation
I followed the setup guide but my {activationProductType} is still not working
The activation process for my {activationProductType} has timed out
I plugged everything in but the {activationProductType} just has a {activationProblemType}
My screen says activation failure when I try to go live
I received a text saying my {activationProductType} could not be activated
The quickstart self-install isn't working — my broadband won't come online
I've been trying to activate my {activationProductType} for hours and it's still not on

I haven't received my {activationProductType} activation code and the link has expired
My {activationProductType} box is showing {activationProblemType} and won't finish setting up
I've activated my {activationProductType} but the app still says it's inactive
The app says it can't establish a connection to my new {activationProductType}
